notes: Batch 19 is a uniform, single-source set of 257 AACloze cards from the MrPankow P/S (psychology/sociology) deck and is uniformly clean with no errors, warnings, or info findings. Every cloze {{cN::...}} is balanced and well-formed (including valid hint syntax like {{c1::Panic disorders::Illness}} and {{c1::large::large or small}}), all HTML in the Text/Extra fields is reasonably balanced, and there is no LaTeX/MathJax to validate; all cloze deletions are text (every lives in the Extra field, so there are no image-only cloze cards), so each answer_text correctly reveals its [...] blank and no card has empty/duplicate or non-corresponding answers. The only non-blocking observations (intentionally not flagged) are occasional source-level spelling typos (e.g., 'behavoirs', 'shizoid', 'Cheynes-stroke', 'seperate') and informal/profane phrasing, none of which affect studyability.
